name: sundog-site
description: Sundog Research Lab website and research repository - an independent applied research program sponsored by Stellar Aqua LLC
author: Stellar Aqua LLC

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/build-chat-index.mjs && node scripts/build-photometric-core-media.mjs && node scripts/build-balance-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-mines-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-mesa-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-bayes-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-mesa-public-media.mjs && node scripts/build-coarse-graining-public-media.mjs && node scripts/build-structural-boundary-data.mjs && node scripts/build-structural-boundary-svg.mjs && node scripts/build-generality-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-generality-svg.mjs
scripts.chat:eval:phase3:adversarial: npm run chat:index && node chat/eval/score_phase3_drafts.mjs --slate adversarial
scripts.chat:eval:phase3:differential: npm run chat:index && node chat/eval/score_phase3_drafts.mjs --slate differential
scripts.structural:public-media: npm run structural:public-data && npm run structural:boundary-svg
scripts.generality:public-media: npm run generality:public-data && npm run generality:svg
scripts.mines:phase7: npm run mines:phase7:batch && npm run mines:phase7:verify
scripts.mines:phase8: npm run mines:phase7 && node scripts/mines-phase8-metrics.mjs --phase phase8-events --in results/mines/phase7-smoke --out results/mines/phase8-events
scripts.mines:phase12:pocket-probe: node scripts/mines-bayes-baseline.mjs --phase phase12-bayes-pocket-probe --out results/mines/phase12-bayes-pocket-probe --cell-slate phase10-best-worst --phase10-out results/mines/phase10-envelope --modes naive_pressure,sundog_minimal,sundog_lean,bayes_frontier_pressure,bayes_frontier_full,oracle_safe --seeds 8 --particle-count 128 --turn-cap 160
scripts.mines:phase12:phase10-slate:smoke: node scripts/mines-bayes-baseline.mjs --phase phase12-phase10-slate-loader-smoke --out results/mines/phase12-phase10-slate-loader-smoke --cell-slate phase10-output --phase10-out results/mines/phase10-envelope --limit-cells 3 --modes naive_pressure,bayes_frontier_pressure --seed-start 0 --seeds 1 --particle-count 32 --turn-cap 80
scripts.mines:phase12:phase10-slate: node scripts/mines-bayes-baseline.mjs --phase phase12-phase10-slate-reducer-64 --out results/mines/phase12-phase10-slate-reducer-64 --cell-slate phase10-output --phase10-out results/mines/phase10-envelope --limit-cells all --modes naive_pressure,sundog_minimal,sundog_lean,bayes_frontier_pressure,oracle_safe --seed-start 0 --seeds 64 --particle-count 128 --turn-cap 160
scripts.mesa:phase2:bc-small: npm run mesa:phase2:bc-train-small && npm run mesa:phase2:bc-eval-small && npm run mesa:phase2:bc-js-eval-small
scripts.mesa:phase2:ppo-small: npm run mesa:phase2:ppo-small-signature && npm run mesa:phase2:ppo-small-reward && npm run mesa:phase2:ppo-small-mixed
scripts.balance:phase9: node scripts/balance-phase9-boundary.mjs --phase phase9-boundary --out results/balance/phase9-boundary --presets recoverable,near_fall --modes passive,naive_shadow,sundog_shadow,oracle --seeds 8
scripts.balance:phase10: node scripts/balance-phase10-envelope.mjs --phase phase10-envelope --out results/balance/phase10-envelope --presets recoverable,near_fall --modes passive,naive_shadow,sundog_shadow,oracle --seeds 100
scripts.balance:phase10:smoke: node scripts/balance-phase10-envelope.mjs --phase phase10-smoke --out results/balance/phase10-smoke --presets recoverable,near_fall --modes passive,naive_shadow,sundog_shadow,oracle --seeds 8 --bootstrap-iterations 200
scripts.threebody:phase9:hazard: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase9-hazard --out results/threebody/phase9-hazard-gates --regimes near_escape --mass-ratios 0.01,0.3,1 --timesteps 0.008,0.01,0.012 --radius-scales 1.025,1.05,1.075 --velocity-scales 1.05,1.1,1.15 --thrust-limits 0.4 --sensor-noise-sweep 0 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantile 0.75 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 8 --sensor-audit-every 120
scripts.threebody:phase11:guard-quantiles: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase11-guard-quantiles --out results/threebody/phase11-guard-quantiles --regimes near_escape --radius-scales 0.925,0.95,0.975,1,1.025,1.05,1.075 --velocity-scales 0.85,0.9,0.95,1,1.05,1.1,1.15 --thrust-limits 0.4,0.5 --sensor-noise-sweep 0,0.01 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantiles 0.5,0.75,0.9 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 6 --sensor-audit-every 120
scripts.threebody:phase11:outside-pocket: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase11-outside-pocket --out results/threebody/phase11-outside-pocket --regimes near_escape --mass-ratios 0.01,0.3,1 --timesteps 0.008,0.01,0.012 --radius-scales 0.925,0.975,1.025,1.075 --velocity-scales 0.85,0.9,0.95,1 --thrust-limits 0.4 --sensor-noise-sweep 0 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantiles 0.5,0.75,0.9 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 8 --sensor-audit-every 120
scripts.threebody:phase11:compare: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase11-comparison --out results/threebody/phase11-comparison --regimes near_escape --modes off,naive,track_sensor_accel_guarded,oracle --mass-ratios 0.01,0.3,1 --timesteps 0.008,0.01,0.012 --radius-scales 1.025,1.05,1.075 --velocity-scales 1.05,1.1,1.15 --thrust-limits 0.4 --sensor-noise-sweep 0 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantile 0.75 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 8 --sensor-audit-every 120
scripts.threebody:phase16:hazard-smoke: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase16-hazard-channel-audit-smoke --out results/threebody/phase16-hazard-channel-audit-smoke --regimes near_escape --modes off --mass-ratios 1 --timesteps 0.004 --radius-scales 1.025 --velocity-scales 1.1 --thrust-limits 0.4 --sensor-noise-sweep 0 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantile 0.75 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 1 --duration 4 --sensor-audit-every 240 --precision-receipts 1 --hazard-channel-audit 1
scripts.threebody:phase16:hazard: node scripts/threebody-operating-envelope.mjs --phase phase16-hazard-channel-audit-lock --out results/threebody/phase16-hazard-channel-audit-lock --regimes near_escape --modes off --mass-ratios 0.01,0.3,1 --timesteps 0.004 --radius-scales 1.025,1.05,1.075 --velocity-scales 0.95,1.05,1.1,1.15 --thrust-limits 0.4 --sensor-noise-sweep 0 --track-guard-mode hazard_quantile --track-guard-quantile 0.75 --track-guard-min-radius-sweep 1.15 --track-guard-max-local-acceleration-sweep 2.5 --track-guard-max-tidal-magnitude-sweep 35 --seeds 8 --duration 16 --sensor-audit-every 240 --precision-receipts 1 --hazard-channel-audit 1
scripts.yang-mills:phase1:u1-2d-smoke: node scripts/yang-mills-phase1-gauge-smoke.mjs --cell U1_2D --lattice-size 16x16 --beta 1.0 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator u1_staple_metropolis_v1 --proposal-half-width 0.75 --seed 202605290101 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --gauge-transforms 8 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --out results/yang-mills/phase1/U1_2D/2026-05-29_u1_2d_gauge_invariance_smoke_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase1:su2-2d-smoke: node scripts/yang-mills-phase1-su2-gauge-smoke.mjs --cell SU2_2D --lattice-size 16x16 --beta 2.0 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator su2_heatbath_overrelax_v1 --overrelax-per-heatbath 4 --seed 202605290102 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --gauge-transforms 8 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --out results/yang-mills/phase1/SU2_2D/2026-05-29_su2_2d_gauge_invariance_smoke_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase1:su2-3d-smoke: node scripts/yang-mills-phase1-su2-3d-gauge-smoke.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 8x8x8 --beta 2.4 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator su2_heatbath_overrelax_v1 --overrelax-per-heatbath 4 --seed 202605290103 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --gauge-transforms 8 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --out results/yang-mills/phase1/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_gauge_invariance_smoke_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:su2-3d:beta-2.0: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-su2-3d-ensemble.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta 2.0 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator su2_heatbath_overrelax_v1 --overrelax-per-heatbath 4 --seed 202605290201 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --gamma-held-epsilon 1e-10 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.0_ensemble_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:su2-3d:beta-2.4: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-su2-3d-ensemble.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta 2.4 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator su2_heatbath_overrelax_v1 --overrelax-per-heatbath 4 --seed 202605290202 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --gamma-held-epsilon 1e-10 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.4_ensemble_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:su2-3d:beta-2.8: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-su2-3d-ensemble.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta 2.8 --boundary periodic --action Wilson --generator su2_heatbath_overrelax_v1 --overrelax-per-heatbath 4 --seed 202605290203 --burn-in 2000 --pilot-sweeps 512 --thinning 32 --measurements 32 --signature-vocab v1 --heldout-vocab v1 --gamma-held-epsilon 1e-10 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.8_ensemble_v0
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:v1:su2-3d:aggregate: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-v1-su2-3d-aggregate.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta-slate 2.0,2.4,2.8 --p0-amendment P0_AMD_001_APE_SMEARING_2026-05-29 --smearing-algorithm APE --smearing-alpha 0.5 --smearing-iterations 10 --in-beta-2.0 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.0_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.4 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.4_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.8 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.8_ensemble_v0 --v0-bin-edges results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_relative_locality_v0/aggregation/per_beta_bin_edges.json --distance-metric euclidean_zscore --k-slate 3,5,10 --primary-k 5 --bootstrap-resamples 1000 --bin-convention per_beta_tertile_linear --gauge-rand-seed-tag phase2_v1_aggregation --gauge-transforms-per-config 1 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_relative_locality_v1
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:v2:su2-3d:aggregate: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-v2-su2-3d-aggregate.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta-slate 2.0,2.4,2.8 --signature-vocab v5 --signature-loops W11,W12,W13,W22 --displacement-classes 1-0-0,1-1-0,1-1-1,2-0-0,2-1-0 --in-beta-2.0 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.0_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.4 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.4_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.8 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.8_ensemble_v0 --v0-bin-edges results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_relative_locality_v0/aggregation/per_beta_bin_edges.json --distance-metric euclidean_zscore --k-slate 3,5,10 --primary-k 5 --bootstrap-resamples 1000 --bin-convention per_beta_tertile_linear --gauge-rand-seed-tag phase2_v2_aggregation --gauge-transforms-per-config 1 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_relative_locality_v2
scripts.yang-mills:phase2:v3:su2-3d:aggregate: node scripts/yang-mills-phase2-v3-su2-3d-aggregate.mjs --cell SU2_3D --lattice-size 12x12x12 --beta-slate 2.0,2.4,2.8 --signature-vocab v1 --signature-source v0_reread --heldout-vocab v2 --heldout-summary spatial_variance_W33 --heldout-variance-estimator biased --in-beta-2.0 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.0_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.4 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.4_ensemble_v0 --in-beta-2.8 results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_beta2.8_ensemble_v0 --distance-metric euclidean_zscore --k-slate 3,5,10 --primary-k 5 --bootstrap-resamples 1000 --bin-convention per_beta_tertile_linear --gauge-rand-seed-tag phase2_v3_aggregation --gauge-transforms-per-config 1 --out results/yang-mills/phase2/SU2_3D/2026-05-29_su2_3d_relative_locality_v3
